rationale: Section 11.424 addresses conflicts between nonprofit organizational regulations and federal contracts for exemptions under Sections 11.18–11.21. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Section 11.13(b).
quote: To the extent of a conflict between a provision in a contract entered into by an organization, association, or entity with the United States and a provision in the charter, a bylaw, or other regulation adopted by the organization or entity to govern its affairs in compliance with Section 11.18(f)(2), 11.19(d)(5), 11.20(c)(4), or 11.21(d)(5), the existence of the contract or the organization's compliance with the contract does not affect the eligibility of the organization, association, or entity to receive an exemption under the applicable section of this code
_note: Rule text concerns nonprofit entity contract conflicts; no relevance to residence homestead exemption amount.
